title: aster miser var. divergens
intro: Aster miser var. divergens, also known as the Western Yarrow or Western Hemlock Aster, is a flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor injuries. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a mild sedative. Herbal preparations of Aster miser var. divergens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
